content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: 8=2³, 27=3³, 64=4³ are perfect cubes. 100 is not a perfect cube.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Mercury, Venus, Mars are planets. Moon is a natural satellite.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Crow, Sparrow, Parrot are birds. Bat is a mammal.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: 17, 31, 43 are prime numbers. 49=7×7 is not prime.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Rose, Lotus, Marigold are flowering plants. Cactus is a succulent, not a flowering plant.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Hammer, Pliers, Spanner are mechanical tools. Compass is a drawing/navigation instrument.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: 4=2², 9=3², 16=4² are perfect squares. 20 is not a perfect square.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Lion, Tiger, Leopard are big cats (felines). Elephant is a pachyderm, not a feline.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Copper, Iron, Aluminium are metals. Coal is a fossil fuel (non-metal).

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Nose, Ear, Eye are sensory organs on the face. Brain is an internal organ.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Violin, Guitar, Sitar are string instruments. Flute is a wind instrument.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: 36=6², 64=8², 81=9² are perfect squares. 48 is not a perfect square.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: February (28/29 days), April (30), June (30) have fewer than 31 days. August has 31 days.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Whale, Dolphin, Seal are marine mammals. Shark is a fish.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Kilogram, Meter, Litre are SI units of quantity. Celsius is a scale of temperature, not a unit of quantity.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Mango, Banana, Apple are fruits. Carrot is a vegetable (root).

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: 2, 3, 7 are prime numbers. 9=3×3 is not prime.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Nitrogen, Oxygen, Hydrogen are elements. Water (H₂O) is a compound.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Cricket, Football, Hockey are outdoor team sports. Chess is an indoor board game.

content: Odd One Out — Which does NOT belong to the group?
explanation: Square, Rectangle, Rhombus are 2D shapes. Cube is a 3D solid.
